title: Ryno Tools Quiz Question
description: Canonical contract for a single quiz question. A dataset file is a JSON array of these objects. This schema is the single source of truth consumed by the validator and pipeline.
$comment: JSON Schema cannot express cross-field rules. The validator additionally enforces: (1) `correct` MUST be one of `choices` (matched as TEXT, because the app shuffles choices at render time and matches by value, not index); (2) `id` is unique across the dataset; (3) no duplicate question content; (4) tags are drawn from data-pipeline/taxonomy.json.

id.description: Stable content fingerprint: `<subcategory-slug>-<sha1(question + sorted choices + correct)[:10]>`.

topic_id.description: Optional native pool ID prefix (e.g. NCVEC group 'G9C').

image.description: Optional image URL; empty string when none.
